name: codistan-sales-automation
description: Internal Codistan opportunity intelligence, tender discovery and human-approved outreach platform.

scripts.test:vercel-runtime: tsx scripts/vercel-runtime-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/dashboard-access-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/manual-intake-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/prospect-quality-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/portfolio-catalog-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/closeability-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/campaign-quality-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/operations-observability-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/login-lockout-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/tender-pipeline-smoke.ts && tsx apps/web/src/legacy-boundary.test.ts
scripts.deploy:check: pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck:vercel && pnpm test:vercel-runtime && pnpm test:delivery-observability && tsx scripts/release-gate-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/linkedin-warm-signals-smoke.ts
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm -r --filter "@sales-automation/*" --sort test && pnpm test:vercel-runtime && pnpm test:delivery-observability && tsx scripts/release-gate-smoke.ts && tsx scripts/linkedin-warm-signals-smoke.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build && pnpm -r --filter "@sales-automation/*" --sort typecheck && pnpm typecheck:vercel
